basicDetails.schemeName: Assistance to Trusts/Institutions for Setting Up Cultural Centers/Auditoriums in the Municipal Area

nodalDepartmentName.label: Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Assistance to Trusts/Institutions for Setting Up Cultural Centers/Auditoriums in the Municipal Area" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to strengthen cultural development and encourage the preservation and promotion of arts and heritage by supporting the creation and improvement of cultural infrastructure in urban regions. Under this initiative, eligible trusts and institutions are provided financial assistance either for constructing new cultural centres or for renovating existing ones. The scheme is implemented by the Sangeet Natak Academy, Gujarat.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Assistance for New Construction:** 50% of the total cost or ₹30,00,000/- whichever is lower. - **Assistance for Renovation:** Up to ₹15,00,000/-.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance to Trusts/Institutions for Setting Up Cultural Centers/Auditoriums in the Municipal Area" aims to promote cultural infrastructure through financial assistance to trusts and institutions for building or renovating cultural centres within municipal areas.

children.text: The scheme "Assistance to Trusts/Institutions for Setting Up Cultural Centers/Auditoriums in the Municipal Area" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to strengthen cultural development and encourage the preservation and promotion of arts and heritage by supporting the creation and improvement of cultural infrastructure in urban regions. Under this initiative, eligible trusts and institutions are provided financial assistance either for constructing new cultural centres or for renovating existing ones. The scheme is implemented by the Sangeet Natak Academy, Gujarat.
50% of the total cost or ₹30,00,000/- whichever is lower.
Applicants must prepare a proposal on plain paper detailing the purpose, estimated cost, and intended use.
In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the Gujarat State Sangeet Natak Academy.
Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** Applicants must prepare a proposal on plain paper detailing the purpose, estimated cost, and intended use. **Step 2:** In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required). **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the Gujarat State Sangeet Natak Academy. **Step 4:** Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted. > [**Contact Us**](https://sangeetnatak.gujarat.gov.in/contacts.htm)

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - A trust or institution operating within the municipal areas of Gujarat shall be eligible for this scheme.

children.text: A trust or institution operating within the municipal areas of Gujarat shall be eligible for this scheme.
